summary: Designs a generation skill that reads local change evidence and writes a bounded release-note draft from deterministic inputs. [CONFIG]

frontmatter.name: release-note-drafter
frontmatter.description: Use when a user needs a release-note drafting skill that reads local changelog evidence, generates structured release notes, and writes a bounded draft artifact.

guiding_principle: The skill must generate only from supplied local evidence and keep written artifacts scoped to the requested release-note destination. [DOC]

procedure.input: Requested release scope and local changelog paths.
procedure.output: Candidate source files and draft destination.

procedure.input: Changelog, commit summary, and release template files.
procedure.output: Structured evidence grouped by feature, fix, risk, and migration.
Draft release note sections with evidence tags.

quality_criteria: Each release-note claim maps to local changelog, commit, or template evidence. [CODE]
Migration notes are separated from ordinary fixes and features. [CONFIG]
Missing evidence is reported as a gap rather than filled with invented content. [ASSUMPTION]
The draft path is bounded by the user request or existing release-note directory. [CONFIG]
Audience and tone are preserved from the selected template. [DOC]
anti_patterns: Writing outside the requested release-note destination.
Adding product claims that are absent from local evidence.
Treating internal TODOs as shipped behavior.
Combining unrelated release scopes in the same draft.

edge_cases.case: The changelog has fixes but no features.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Emit a fixes-only draft and omit empty feature claims. [CODE]

edge_cases.case: The requested draft destination is missing.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Create only the explicitly requested bounded file path. [CONFIG]

edge_cases.case: A migration item lacks rollback evidence.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Flag rollback as missing evidence in risks. [ASSUMPTION]

tool_rationale.reason: Creates the bounded release-note draft artifact. [CONFIG]
Finds release-note templates inside the requested scope. [CODE]
Finds deterministic release markers such as migration, fix, and feature headings. [CODE]

validation: The fixture is accepted by validate_design_skill_spec.py without network access. [CODE]
The generation tool profile matches the exact allowed-tools set. [CONFIG]
risks: Generated notes remain limited by the completeness of local release evidence. [ASSUMPTION]
